name: io.github.keibai-hub/keibai-hub-mcp
title: 不動産競売 構造化データハブ — Japan real-estate auctions
description: Remote MCP server for Japanese court-run real-estate auctions (BIT, bit.courts.go.jp). ~1,480 active listings across 46 prefectures and 110+ district courts. 5 tools: search_auctions, get_auction_detail, list_upcoming_sales, get_court_directory, find_practitioner_for_auction. Updated twice daily (06:07 / 18:07 JST). CC BY 4.0.
